message:
refactor(beads): restructure artifact naming epic with granular test beads

Changes:
- Create bd-20r: New epic for remote build host reliability
- Move bd-1tv.9 from artifact naming epic to bd-20r
- Add 5 granular unit test beads:
  - bd-2r3q: Test fixtures and harness
  - bd-d5cd: Install.sh parsing tests
  - bd-2ite: Workflow YAML parsing tests
  - bd-3o8x: Dual-name generation tests
  - bd-4g2u: Validation tests
- Add bd-3rmb: Structured logging for artifact naming
- Close superseded beads:
  - bd-1tv.1.4: Superseded by granular test beads
  - bd-1tv.1.5: Superseded by bd-2r3q
  - bd-1tv.11: Superseded by granular test beads
- Fix orphaned bd-3ck dependencies

Result: 25 open beads (2 epics, 23 tasks), 11 actionable, 14 blocked
No dependency cycles.
